candidates.why: Core overhead/personnel expense component and a strong SG&A bucket.
Balance sheet liability, not income statement SG&A expense.
Balance sheet provision, not income statement SG&A expense.

variables.notes: No explicit SG&A total row exists. Selected best overhead components: personnel, other expenses, and share-based compensation. Chose outside the candidate list because it clearly misses additional valid overhead rows such as 'Other expenses' and 'Stock Option Compensation Expense - Pre-tax'. Excluded depreciation/amortization, impairments, finance items, and totals. Did not add 'Research & Development Costs' to avoid likely double counting because it appears to be a separate/supplemental disclosure that is likely embedded within operating overhead buckets. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Other expenses, [Income Statement] Stock Option Compensation Expense - Pre-tax
